_publications._publicationTitle: Reprogramming Captures the Genetic and Tumorigenic Properties of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: NF1(−/−) cells continued exhibiting a high proliferation capacity and heterogeneously expressed some of the markers, such as S100b
details: Successfully detected S100β expression in Schwann cells during differentiation and myelination assays, showing heterogeneous expression in NF1(-/-) differentiating SCs growing in monolayer
